ideation: This animation sequence will playfully mimic the shape and feel of a peach. The robot will start with both arms resting at its sides, then mimic the roundness of the peach by bringing its arms up in a gentle, embracing motion. The arms will then move outward, suggesting the peach's soft flesh, before returning to a relaxed pose.  Each arm movement will be smooth and controlled, and the wrists will turn slightly to complement the shape. The overall effect should be lighthearted and fun.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides, ready to form
arms gently rise and curve inward, embracing the peach shape
arms open outward, revealing the soft flesh within
arms settle down, the peach is formed
